github._comment: Tier 1 — Core: Create/read issues, PRs, branches, reviews. Used by PMO, Code Reviewer, QA, All Devs.

filesystem._comment: Tier 1 — Core: Safe file read/write in project. Used by all agents.

sequential-thinking._comment: Tier 1 — Core: Structured multi-step reasoning. Used by Tech Lead, BA, PA, PMO.

memory._comment: Tier 2 — Important: Persistent context across conversations. Used by PMO for project state.

postgres._comment: Tier 2 — Important: Direct DB queries, schema validation, EXPLAIN analysis. Used by SQL Specialist, Java Backend.

brave-search._comment: Tier 2 — Important: Search docs, CVE databases, best practices. Used by Security Auditor, Tech Lead.

playwright._comment: Tier 3 — Advanced: E2E browser testing automation. Used by QA/Tester.
